parameters.query:
SELECT DISTINCT p."IdPac", p."Nombre",
  COALESCE(NULLIF(p."TelMovil",''), p."Tel1") AS telefono
FROM "Pacientes" p
INNER JOIN "DCitas" c ON c."IdPac" = p."IdPac"
WHERE (c."Texto" ILIKE '%implante%' OR c."Texto" ILIKE '%cirugía%')
  AND c."IdSitC" = 5
  AND c."Fecha" BETWEEN {{ $json.fecha75 }} - {{ $json.rango }} AND {{ $json.fecha75 }} + {{ $json.rango }}
  AND p."IdPac" NOT IN (
    SELECT c2."IdPac" FROM "DCitas" c2
    WHERE (c2."Texto" ILIKE '%osteointeg%' OR c2."Texto" ILIKE '%revisión implante%')
      AND c2."Fecha" > {{ $json.fecha75 }}
  )
  AND COALESCE(NULLIF(p."TelMovil",''), p."Tel1") IS NOT NULL
  AND (p."AceptaWhatsApp" = true OR p."AceptaWhatsApp" IS NULL)
LIMIT 20
